actor: This agreement re processing of personal data (the ”Data Processor Agreement”)
object: Processor, Company registration no. 25163258 (the ”Data Processor”) processing of personal data on behalf of the customer (the ”Data Controller”)
core_sentence: This agreement re processing of personal data (the ”Data Processor Agreement”) regulates Processor, Company registration no. 25163258 (the ”Data Processor”) processing of personal data on behalf of the customer (the ”Data Controller”).
obligation_groups: DPA Party Identification And Processing Scope
source_text: This agreement re processing of personal data (the ”Data Processor Agreement”) regulates Processor, Company registration no. 25163258 (the ”Data Processor”) processing of personal data on behalf of the customer (the ”Data Controller”) and is attached as appendix A to the Processor subscription agreement (the ”Main Agreement”), in which the parties have agreed the terms for the Data Processor’s delivery of services to the Data Controller (the ”Main Services”). 2. Legislation

object: that the Data Processor complies with the applicable data protection and privacy legislation (the ”Applicable Law”)
core_sentence: The Data Processor Agreement shall ensure that the Data Processor complies with the applicable data protection and privacy legislation (the ”Applicable Law”).
obligation_groups: Processing Instructions And Legal Basis Compliance
DPA Party Identification And Processing Scope
source_text: The Data Processor Agreement shall ensure that the Data Processor complies with the applicable data protection and privacy legislation (the ”Applicable Law”), including in particular:

object: The European Parliament and the Council’s Directive 95/46/EF of 24 October 1995 on the protection of individuals with regard to the processing of personal data and on the free movement of such data as implemented in Danish law with, among others, the Act on Processing of Personal Data (Act No. 429 of 31 May 2000)
core_sentence: The that the Data Processor complies with the applicable data protection and privacy legislation (the ”Applicable Law”) include The European Parliament and the Council’s Directive 95/46/EF of 24 October 1995 on the protection of individuals with regard to the processing of personal data and on the free movement of such data as implemented in Danish law with, among others, the Act on Processing of Personal Data (Act No. 429 of 31 May 2000).
obligation_groups: DPA Party Identification And Processing Scope
Processing Instructions And Legal Basis Compliance
source_text: The European Parliament and the Council’s Directive 95/46/EF of 24 October 1995 on the protection of individuals with regard to the processing of personal data and on the free movement of such data as implemented in Danish law with, among others, the Act on Processing of Personal Data (Act No. 429 of 31 May 2000).

action: are not obliged to comply with
object: GDPR
condition: before 25 May 2018
core_sentence: The parties are not obliged to comply with GDPR.
obligation_groups: Processing Instructions And Legal Basis Compliance
DPA Party Identification And Processing Scope
source_text: The European Parliament and the Council’s Regulation 2016/679 of 27 April 2016 on the protection of natural persons with regard to the processing of personal data and on the free movement of such data that entered into force on 24 May 2016 and will be applicable on 25 May 2018 (“GDPR”). Irrespective of the general use and reference to GDPR in this Data Processor Agreement, the parties are not obliged to comply with GDPR before 25 May 2018. 3. Processing of personal data

recipient: on behalf of the Data Controller

source_text: In connection with the Data Processor’s delivery of the Main Services to the Data Controller, the Data Processor will process certain categories and types of the Data Controller’s personal data on behalf of the Data Controller.

object: personal data about the Data Controller and the Data Controller’s employees

source_text: The Data Processor processes personal data about the Data Controller and the Data Controller’s employees in connection with the Data Processor’s sale, marketing and product development. These personal data are not comprised by this Data Processor Agreement, because the Data Processor is data controller for said personal data, and reference is made to the Data Processor’s data protection and privacy policy available at the Data Processor’s website. 4. object: third-parties to process the Personal Data (“Sub-Processors”)
condition: without obtaining any further written, specific authorization from the Data Controller
core_sentence: The Data Processor is given general authorization to engage third-parties to process the Personal Data (“Sub-Processors”).
obligation_groups: Sub-Processor Authorization And Oversight
source_text: The Data Processor is given general authorization to engage third-parties to process the Personal Data (“Sub-Processors”) without obtaining any further written, specific authorization from the Data Controller, provided that the Data Processor notifies the Data Controller in writing about the identity of a potential Sub-Processor (and its processors, if any) before any agreements are made with the relevant Sub-Processors and before the relevant Sub-Processor processes any of the Personal Data. If the Data Controller wish to object to the relevant Sub- Processor, the Data Controller shall give notice hereof in writing within seven

timing: before any agreements are made with the relevant Sub-Processors and before the relevant Sub-Processor processes any of the Personal Data

If the Data Controller wish to object to the relevant Sub- Processor, the Data Controller shall give notice hereof in writing within seven

source_text: calendar days from receiving the notification from the Data Processor. Absence of any objections from the Data Controller shall be deemed a consent to the relevant Sub-Processor.

object: a written sub-processor agreement with any Sub-Processors
manner: written
core_sentence: The Data Processor shall conclude a written sub-processor agreement with any Sub-Processors.
obligation_groups: Sub-Processor Authorization And Oversight
source_text: The Data Processor shall conclude a written sub-processor agreement with any Sub-Processors. Such an agreement shall at minimum provide the same data protection obligations as the ones applicable to the Data Processor, including the obligations under this Data Processor Agreement. The Data Processor shall on an ongoing basis monitor and control its Sub- Processors’ compliance with the Applicable Law. Documentation of such monitoring and control shall be provided to the Data Controller if so requested in writing.

object: the same data protection obligations as the ones applicable to the Data Processor
core_sentence: Such an agreement shall provide the same data protection obligations as the ones applicable to the Data Processor.

source_text: The Data Processor shall conclude a written sub-processor agreement with any Sub-Processors. Such an agreement shall at minimum provide the same data protection obligations as the ones applicable to the Data Processor, including the obligations under this Data Processor Agreement. The Data Processor shall on an ongoing basis monitor and control its Sub- Processors’ compliance with the Applicable Law. Documentation of such monitoring and control shall be provided to the Data Controller if so requested in writing.
